articles.title: $572,000,000,000 Added to US Debt in Two Weeks, Total Debt Now Exceeds China, Japan, Germany and UK’s Combined GDP
articles.description: Over half a trillion more dollars have been dumped into the US government’s debt spiral in the last two weeks alone. According to the latest numbers from FiscalData, as of June 15th, the US national debt was $32.03 trillion, a $571 billion rise from June 1st’s recording of $31.46 trillion. Total US debt is now […]
